name: ThermalRadiatorSubsystem
description: Spacecraft thermal control radiator panel model — THIS VERSION HAS DELIBERATE ERRORS for Validibot demo purposes.

ownedMember.name: RadiatorPanel
ownedMember.description: A flat-plate spacecraft radiator panel with thermal coating properties.

ownedAttribute.name: emissivity
ownedAttribute.description: ERROR: Negative emissivity is physically impossible

ownedAttribute.name: absorptivity
ownedAttribute.description: Solar absorptivity of the radiator coating (0–1)

ownedAttribute.name: mass
ownedAttribute.description: ERROR: Negative mass is physically impossible

ownedPort.name: thermalInput
ownedPort.description: Incident solar flux and spacecraft internal heat load

ownedAttribute.name: solarIrradiance
ownedAttribute.description: Solar constant at spacecraft orbital distance

ownedMember.name: ThermalCoupling
ownedMember.description: ERROR: This interface has only ONE end instead of the required two.

ownedMember.name: OperatingTemperatureRange
ownedMember.description: The radiator panel equilibrium temperature shall remain within the allowable range for the thermal coating.
ownedMember.text: The radiator equilibrium temperature shall be between 150 K and 400 K under all operational thermal environments.

ownedMember.description: ERROR: References a requirement ID that doesn't exist in this model.

analysisAction.name: runThermalFMU
analysisAction.description: Execute the ThermalRadiator.fmu with panel properties as inputs.
